calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:43:12 a.m. and concluding at 11:22:41 a.m.

Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco by and through the San Francisco Port Commission represented by S. Patrick Kelly, Esq.
Defendant East-West Seafood, Inc. not appearing.
Defendant Xin Liu not appearing.
Defendant Nelson Lau appearing in pro per. Defendant is assisted by a Cantonese Language Interpreter, Winnie Chan; Certification No. 785540.

DEMETRI AMARO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Defendant Nelson Lau appearing.
Court determines default as to Defendant Nelson Lau was entered Aug-02-2022.
Defendant to seek relief from default. Plaintiff request to proceed against Defendant East-West Seafood is argued. Plaintiff presents offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Three-Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit - Possession of the Premises (Nonpayment of Rent)

Plaintiff's request to proceed against Defendant East-West Seafood is GRANTED.
Defendant Nelson Lau has no legal right to defend himself, make comments, or protest. He is permitted to observe the proceedings. Court admonishes Defendant.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. B - Letter from the Port of San Francisco addressed to Mr. Xin Liu from Demetri Amaro dated November 16th, 2021

DEMETRI AMARO is examined by the Court. Witness attests that its Declaration filed on Nov-02-2022 and statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the evidence presented, declarations of Plantiff's counsel and its witness, Court finds Plaintiff provided sufficient proof. Defendant breached their lease agreement and failed to pay rent for the period of July 2021 thru July 2022.

Court awards base rent of $6,522.39 reflected on the 3 Day Notice for the period of July 2021 thru July 2022 + Holdover Damages for a period of 3 months.

Plaintiff waives attorney fees.
DOES 1-50 remain to continue litigation against remaining Defendants.

After consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco by and through the San Francisco Port Commission, and against Defendant East-West Seafood, Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $78,268.68
2. Holdover Damages: $19,567.17
3. Costs: $1,570.25

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $99,406.10
Proposed judgment to be submitted.
